title: Bitcoin hits $65.5K as more surprise US inflation data sparks three-week BTC price high

title: BlackRock has best-ever start to a year as investment flows double and profits surge
summary: Shares of BlackRock were rallying toward their best day in more than a year on Wednesday, after strong inflows into exchange-traded funds and buoyant markets helped the world’s biggest asset manager beat Wall Street’s earnings expectations for the latest quarter.
